zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Gand於大約1122年出生在英國林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆時，他的父親Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln43歲，母親Maud de Penthièvre36歲。他於大約1150年與Alicia Paynel在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他埋葬在英國林可爾史爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gand
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French Gaineau, itself a variant of Ganeau: from the ancient Germanic personal name Gagino, from gagin ‘gain, win’. The surname Gaineau is very rare in France. Compare Ganoe and Gunnoe .

History: The Huguenot Étienne Gaineau or Gayneau from La Rochelle in Charente-Maritime, France, married Lydia Mestereau in La Rochelle in 1653, died in Staten Island, NY, in 1706. His name is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (as Étienne Gaineau or Ganeau or Geneau or Gano) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America (as Etienne Gaineau or Gano).

variants.name: Gunnoe
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Mechelle, Pierre.
Variant of   Gano  , a surname of French origin.

variants.name: Ganoe
meanings: Variant of   Gano  , a surname of French origin.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Gand was born about 1122, in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln, was 43 and his mother, Maud de Penthièvre, was 36. He married Alicia Paynel about 1150, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He was buried in Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Gand est né environ 1122, à Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Maud de Penthièvre, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Alicia Paynel environ 1150, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Ilenterré à Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Gand(이)가 대략 1122년 영국 링코실르 폴킨그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Penthièvre(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1150년 영국에서 Alicia Paynel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 링코실르에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Gand родился около 1122 г. в местности фолкингхам, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Maud de Penthièvre, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Alicia Paynel около 1150 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он был похоронен в местности линколншир, Англия.
